emails.body: I NEED HELP JOHN CHILDRES WITH ALPINE IS GETTING MADE AND WANTS TO BE PAID. I HAVE NOTHING TO PAY HIM. HE IS LOOKING FOR PAYMENT OF DEC. 2000, AND JAN. 2001. JOHN NEEDS TO PAY HIS ROYALTY OWNERS. WOULD SOMEONE PLEASE HELP ME GET THIS MATTER RESOLVED. Charlene Richmond 02/21/2001 05:38 PM
